"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Chip8.dir/objects.a
C:\ProgramData\mingw64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\Chip8.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Chip8.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\ProgramData\mingw64\mingw64\bin\cc.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Chip8.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o Chip8.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libChip8.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Chip8.dir\linkLibs.rsp
